subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath shone forth through the radiant lights that gleam from the horizon of utterance upon the Supreme Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی من انوار بوارق المشرقه من افق البیان علی القلم الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @wisdom [hikmat]
